_status: Reference instance. Profile schema and registry mechanics are to be formalized by ADR-0009 (deferred); this file anticipates that schema. The values here are the single source of truth for setpoints (ADR-0000 dec 2); ADR-0003 holds the structure and rationale, not the values.
_philosophy: IndustryGrow plant metaphor: roots = hardware/apparatus, leaves = biological parameters. This profile specifies the leaves (biological subspace, ADR-0016) and binds to the roots (apparatus subspace); it does not re-specify hardware.

crop.comment: Day-neutral strawberry; the cadence-driven operating mode requires day-neutral (not June-bearing) varieties — ADR-0003 Variety (dec 1-2).

operating_mode.comment: Continuous staggered cultivation; one slot completes its cycle each cadence interval — ADR-0003 dec 4.

cycle.comment: Per-plant cycle: vegetative -> fruiting -> decline; new plants from internal propagation — ADR-0003 dec 3, 5.
cycle.propagation: internal; 1-2 mother plants in a cooler zone produce runners, rooted before transplant

leaves.comment: Biological subspace (ADR-0016) - variables the plant physiology responds to; the only variables that receive setpoints.

climate.comment: Day/night differential drives sugar accumulation; humidity regulated by VPD not RH (Botrytis suppression + transpiration) — ADR-0003 dec 6-8.
climate.co2: ambient (no enrichment in the reference build)

air_movement.comment: Canopy airflow for transpiration and leaf-boundary-layer management; verified by the M01 anemometer — ADR-0003 Climate, ADR-0014 M01.

light.comment: Long photoperiod maximises DLI (day-neutral tolerates any); ramped transitions; phase-dependent spectrum; DLI target at the fruiting canopy — ADR-0003 dec 9-12.

spectrum.flowering_fruiting: warm white + 660nm red + 730nm far-red + UV-A 365-385nm trace

root_zone.comment: Hydroponic solution chemistry - biological targets the plant responds to (ADR-0016), not hardware. Phase-dependent EC/pH; calcium prioritised — ADR-0003 dec 14-17.
root_zone.calcium: prioritised; Ca:K above the typical leafy-greens baseline (deficiency causes tipburn and poor fruit quality)

pollination.comment: Mechanical airflow pollination - no insects, no manual brushing — ADR-0003 dec 13.
pollination.method: low-speed fan over the flowering zone

roots.comment: Apparatus subspace (ADR-0016) - the hardware that realises the leaves. Referenced, not re-specified: apparatus bounds are crop-agnostic hardware properties owned by the hardware spec, not copied into a crop profile (ADR-0000 dec 3).

binding.comment: Hardware this profile assumes; owned by the cited ADRs, not by this file.
binding.dosing: two-part A/B nutrient concentrate via peristaltic pumps, switched per slot phase (ADR-0003 dec 17)

roots.apparatus_bounds: held within tolerance / alarmed in software per ADR-0016 (apparatus subspace) and ADR-0018; not crop-specific, not enumerated here
roots.survival_floor: the hardware over-temperature interlock at the heating actuator is an independent override floor, separate from this profile (ADR-0015 dec 11, ADR-0018 dec 10)
